mapper.insert: insert into user (nickname, phone, password, photo, sex, points, reg_date,state,role,email) VALUES (#{user.nickname}, #{user.phone}, #{user.password}, #{user.photo}, #{user.sex}, #{user.points}, #{user.reg_date},#{user.state},#{user.role},#{user.email})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
nickname = #{nickname},
sex = #{sex},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
photo = #{photo},
im_token = #{im_token},
points = #{points},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user
AND (phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
